question: The line chart shows revenue by year. Which of the following statements is supported by the chart as drawn?

options.A: Revenue increased every year shown on the chart.
options.B: 2020 has the highest visible revenue on the chart.
options.C: Revenue in 2021 and 2022 appears to reach the same visible level on the chart.

explanation: The y-axis maximum is set below the data maximum, so the top bars are clipped and appear equal; the true values cannot be compared from the chart alone.
